name: mindee
description: Extract structured data from invoices, receipts, and other financial documents with Mindee's OCR API

envVars.name: MINDEE_API_KEY
envVars.description: Mindee API key from the Mindee platform (sent as 'Authorization: Token <key>')

tools.name: Parse Invoice
tools.description: Extract structured fields (supplier, customer, line items, totals, taxes, dates, payment details) from an invoice PDF or image using the Invoice OCR model. Consumes a page of your Mindee quota per call.

document.description: The invoice to parse: either a publicly accessible HTTPS URL of the file, or the file's base64-encoded contents (PDF, JPEG, PNG, WEBP, TIFF, or HEIC)

tools.name: Parse Receipt
tools.description: Extract structured fields (merchant, date, time, category, line items, taxes, total amounts, tip) from an expense receipt photo or PDF using the Receipt OCR model. Consumes a page of your Mindee quota per call.

document.description: The receipt to parse: either a publicly accessible HTTPS URL of the file, or the file's base64-encoded contents (PDF, JPEG, PNG, WEBP, TIFF, or HEIC)

tools.name: Parse Financial Document
tools.description: Parse a document that may be either an invoice or a receipt: the Financial Document model classifies it and returns the union of invoice and receipt fields. Use this when the document type is unknown. Consumes a page of your Mindee quota per call.

document.description: The document to parse: either a publicly accessible HTTPS URL of the file, or the file's base64-encoded contents (PDF, JPEG, PNG, WEBP, TIFF, or HEIC)

prompts.title: Extract invoice data
prompts.prompt: Parse this invoice with Mindee and summarize the supplier, invoice number, due date, line items, and total amount.

prompts.title: Log an expense receipt
prompts.prompt: Parse this receipt with Mindee and give me the merchant, date, category, and total so I can log the expense.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Mindee setup

steps.title: Create a free Mindee account
steps.description: Sign up at https://platform.mindee.com — no payment details required. The free plan includes a monthly page allowance, so you can start parsing documents immediately.

steps.title: Get your API key
steps.description: A development API key is generated for you as soon as your account exists. Find it in the Mindee platform under API Keys, and store it as MINDEE_API_KEY. It is sent on every request as 'Authorization: Token <key>'.

steps.title: Test with a sample document
steps.description: Run the Parse Invoice tool with a publicly accessible URL of a sample invoice PDF, or the file's base64-encoded contents, and check that structured fields come back.

notes: The 'document' field accepts either a base64-encoded file or a publicly accessible HTTPS URL; URL inputs must be reachable without authentication

These tools call Mindee's V1 product APIs (api.mindee.net): Invoice v4, Receipt v5, and Financial Document v1; Mindee's newer model-based V2 platform (api-v2.mindee.net) uses per-account model IDs and is not covered here
Each predict call consumes pages from your plan's quota (multi-page PDFs consume one page per parsed page)
